summary.lv: Senior Test Automation inženiera amats Eleving fintech organizācijā, projektējot un uzturot automatizēto testu komplektus ar Playwright (TypeScript), CI/CD integrāciju un AI rīkiem, kā arī mentorējot komandu.
summary.en: A Senior Test Automation Engineer role at Eleving fintech designing and maintaining automated test suites with Playwright (TypeScript), CI/CD integration and AI tooling, and mentoring the team.
